key_models.mail.thread: Abstract mixin providing chatter, followers, subtypes, tracking, and message posting. Key methods: message_post, message_subscribe, message_unsubscribe, message_track, _message_auto_subscribe_followers, _message_get_default_recipients.
key_models.mail.activity: Scheduled to-do item linked to a record. Fields: res_model, res_id, activity_type_id, user_id, date_deadline, summary, note, automated.
key_models.mail.activity.mixin: Mixin that adds activity_schedule, activity_feedback, activity_reschedule, and activity_ids to models.
key_models.mail.activity.type: Activity category/template. Fields: name, category (default, upload_document, phonecall, meeting), default_user_id, default_note, delay_count, delay_unit, summary, chaining_type, triggered_next_type_id.
key_models.mail.activity.plan: Predefined set of activities. Fields: res_model_ids, company_id, template_ids (mail.activity.plan.template).
key_models.mail.message: Stored message on a thread. Fields: res_model, res_id, model, message_type (email, comment, notification, user_notification, sms), subtype_id, parent_id, author_id, partner_ids.
key_models.mail.notification: Per-recipient notification record for a mail.message. Fields: mail_message_id, notification_type (email, inbox, sms, snailmail, push), notification_status (ready, sent, delivered, bounced, exception, canceled), failure_type, author_id.
key_models.mail.mail: Outgoing email queue record. Fields: mail_message_id, state (outgoing, sent, received, exception, cancelled), email_to, email_from, body_html, auto_delete, failure_reason.
key_models.mail.template: QWeb email template. Fields: model_id, subject, email_from, email_to, partner_to, body_html, report_template_ids, lang, auto_delete.
key_models.mail.alias: Inbound email alias routing. Fields: alias_name, alias_model_id, alias_parent_model_id, alias_defaults, alias_contact (everyone, partners, employees), alias_bounced_content.
key_models.mail.channel: Discuss conversation. Fields: name, channel_type (channel, group, chat), group_public_id, is_member, uuid (for guests).
key_models.mail.channel.member: Membership of a partner/user in a channel. Fields: channel_id, partner_id, guest_id, fetched_message_id, seen_message_id, custom_channel_name, custom_notifications.
key_models.mail.blacklist: Opt-out / bounced email address. Fields: email, active, message_ids.
key_models.mail.bounce: Raw bounce message metadata. Fields: email, msg_id, model, res_id.
key_models.mail.followers: Subscription of a partner or channel to a record. Fields: res_model, res_id, partner_id, channel_id, subtype_ids.

key_files.mail/models/mail_thread.py: Core mail.thread mixin: message_post, message_subscribe, message_route, bounce handling, tracking, followers.
key_files.mail/models/mail_message.py: mail.message model: message storage, search, moderation, notification generation, message_format.
key_files.mail/models/mail_notification.py: mail.notification model: per-recipient notification status and failure tracking.
key_files.mail/models/mail_mail.py: mail.mail model: SMTP queue, send, split by recipient, state management, exception handling.
key_files.mail/models/mail_template.py: mail.template model: QWeb rendering, report attachment, template copy/generation.
key_files.mail/models/mail_activity.py: mail.activity, mail.activity.type, mail.activity.mixin, mail.activity.plan and scheduling logic.
key_files.mail/models/mail_alias.py: mail.alias model and inbound message routing.
key_files.mail/models/mail_channel.py: Discuss channel and member models, permissions, RTC, guest access.

crons.ir_cron_mail_gateway_action: Fetch incoming emails from configured IMAP/POP servers. Model: fetchmail.server, method: _fetch_mails.
crons.ir_cron_send_scheduled_message: Send scheduled messages. Model: mail.message.schedule, method: _send_notifications.
crons.mail.ir_cron_delete_notification: Delete old notifications. Model: mail.notification, method: _notification_delete_old.
crons.mail.ir_cron_delete_tokens: Clean expired mail/channel guest tokens. Model: mail.channel, method: _gc_delete_guest_tokens.
crons.mail.ir_cron_update_notification: Update notification cache / batch status. Model: mail.notification, method: _notify_update.

security_groups.base.group_user: Standard internal user. Can read/post on threads they can access, manage own activities, and subscribe to channels.
security_groups.base.group_system: Administrator / Settings user. Full access to mail configuration: aliases, outgoing mail servers, activity types, templates, blacklist.

record_rules.mail.message.user_has_access: Restricts mail.message read to messages on records the user can access, plus messages where the user is a direct recipient or author.
record_rules.mail.notification.user_notification: Users can read notifications addressed to themselves or authored by themselves.
record_rules.mail.activity.user.own: Users can see activities assigned to themselves or created by themselves, plus activities on records they can access.
record_rules.mail.followers.user_followed_record: Users can read followers on records they can access.
record_rules.mail.channel.rule: Channels are readable by members or when public/open groups; restricted by channel_type and group_public_id.
